word: G1226 - διαβεβαιόομαι - diabebaióomai - dee-ab-eb-ahee-o'-om-ahee - Affirm constantly

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to affirm strongly, to assert confidently
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice of a compound of G1223 and G950; to confirm thoroughly (by words), that is, asseverate: - affirm constantly.
